venues.name: Concert Hall
venues.notes: Main performance venue. Full fly system. Steinway D concert grand on site.

venues.name: Recital Hall
venues.notes: Chamber and intimate performances. Bösendorfer 225 on site.

venues.name: Rehearsal Hall A
venues.notes: Primary full-orchestra rehearsal space. Mirrors on north wall. Upright piano on site. Climate controlled.

venues.name: Rehearsal Hall B
venues.notes: Sectional and small ensemble rehearsals. String-friendly flooring. Upright piano on site.

venues.name: Studio 1
venues.notes: Chamber coaching and small ensemble work. Yamaha C3 grand on site. Acoustic panels installed 2022.
